text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through pure tenacity, Narita Taishin manages to
win the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But the mistakes made during training lead to her
breaking under the weight of her mental and
physical exhaustion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She confesses that she needs a break from both
training and racing.
